meta.maintenanceInstruction: KEEP THE PLAN UP TO DATE AS YOU EVOLVE THE CODE. DEVIATIONS TO THE PLAN MUST BE LOGGED WITHIN THE PLAN. THE PLAN MUST BE REASSESSED HOLISTICALLY AFTER ANY CHANGE OF ANY SIZE.
meta.completionPolicy: YOU ARE NOT DONE UNTIL YOU HAVE COMPLETED 100% OF THE BLUEPRINT. DO NOT STOP. YOU MUST REFINE AT REGULAR INTERVALS TO KEEP THE BLUEPRINT FULL. NEVER SPECIFY ANY ESTIMATE OF EFFORT OR COST — ESPECIALLY NOT TIME ESTIMATES. NEVER SPECIFY A PRIORITY OF ANY KIND.
meta.blueprintRefinement: THIS BLUEPRINT MUST BE CONTINUALLY REFINED. After completing any task, before starting the next, re-read this file and assess whether it still accurately captures reality. If any task description is stale, wrong, unclear, or missing context — FIX IT NOW. The blueprint is a living document. A stale blueprint is worse than no blueprint. Refine aggressively: split tasks that are too coarse, merge tasks that are redundant, rewrite descriptions so a cold-start reader can act on them, and add tasks you discover along the way.

globalAlerts.warning: ON TOOLS: Use config.mk to create custom targets to run with Make. ALWAYS use custom targets that limit the amount of output you receive. For example, piping through tail, with FEW lines output. Prior to tail, pipe to tee. The file ./build.log in the root of the project is gitignored, so use that. That way you can search the output. Timing dependent tests are BANNED. As are those that take too long to run. Abide. OBEY.

CLI ENTRY POINT: The CLI wrapper wraps ollama launch claude, NOT just claude. The full invocation path involves: (1) ollama launch claude --config, (2) a TUI model selection menu that MUST be navigated programmatically over PTY, (3) then the Claude Code session itself. The model selection menu is a CRITICAL MANDATORY PATH.
NAMING: The word 'orchestrator' is RETIRED as a module/package name. The correct name is 'claude-mux' or similar (finalised by T031). If you see 'orchestrator' in code or docs, it MUST be corrected.
FEEDBACK CHANNEL: MCP is the PRIMARY means by which Claude Code instances send structured data back to OSM. PTY is for session lifecycle ONLY.
DECISIONS: Every task previously framed as a 'decision' or 'evaluation' reached the WRONG conclusion. The correct answer was always: follow the spec, use the proper library, do the actual work.

mandatoryDirectives.contextManagement: Tasks are grouped to be executed in manageable units. Do not attempt to solve all tasks in a single turn.
mandatoryDirectives.subagentPolicy: Use subagents for execution of distinct task groups, and for the mandatory Rule of Two review gate. Serial only.
mandatoryDirectives.blueprintRefinement: Continual blueprint refinement is MANDATORY. After every task completion, re-read the blueprint and fix stale descriptions. Add discovered work. Split coarse tasks.

statusSection.currentState: CRITICAL REWORK PHASE. Four pre-existing test failures require immediate fixing (T001-T003). Core infrastructure migrations blocked on eventloop replacement (T011). Architecture doc rewrite (T031) gates claude-mux implementation. The 'orchestrator' package name is RETIRED. Goal autodiscovery test leak FIXED. Session timer started: 9 hours from 2026-02-18 01:28:15.

sequentialTasks.task: T001: Fix data race in storage path globals with cleanup scheduler
sequentialTasks.description: Fix data race in internal/storage/paths.go. SetTestPaths() modifies package-level function variables while cleanup scheduler goroutine reads them via ScanSessions(). Affected tests: TestSessionsListAndClean and TestSessionsPathShowsDirectoryAndFile. Fix: add sync.RWMutex around path function variables. Run 'go test -race ./internal/storage/... ./internal/command/...' to verify. Run 'make' to confirm.

sequentialTasks.task: T002: Fix TestSpawn_WorkingDirectory PTY test failure
sequentialTasks.description: Fix in internal/builtin/pty/pty_test.go. Test spawns pwd with Dir set to t.TempDir(), expects output containing temp dir path but gets empty string. Investigate: (1) Read loop breaks too early. (2) macOS symlink resolution — use filepath.EvalSymlinks instead of os.Readlink. (3) Drain output fully before checking errors. Run test to verify.

Fix in internal/builtin/orchestrator/pr_split_test.go. Expects cleanup.deleted.length === 3 but gets 0. Debug cleanupBranches() in scripts/orchestrate-pr-split.js — verify branch name propagation and git branch -D calls. Run test to verify.

sequentialTasks.task: T004: Full make pass — all tests green
sequentialTasks.description: After T001-T003, run 'make make-all-with-log' and confirm zero failures. Check build.log with 'make find-test-failures'. Gate for all subsequent work.
Run 'go test -race -count=3 ./...' to surface intermittent races. Fix any found. Focus: storage globals, cleanup scheduler, eventloop lifecycle, session locking.

sequentialTasks.task: T011: Eventloop migration — replace with github.com/joeycumines/goja-eventloop
sequentialTasks.description: CRITICAL INFRASTRUCTURE. Replace dop251/goja_nodejs/eventloop with github.com/joeycumines/goja-eventloop. Unlocks: goja-grpc (T012), Promise-based fetch (T013), AbortSignal (T015). Imported in 14+ files. Steps: go get, update EventLoopProvider, update all imports/tests, verify Promise support, go mod tidy. Run make, -race, make-all-in-container.
DELETE internal/builtin/grpc/ entirely. Thin wrapper around goja-grpc. BREAKING CHANGE: synchronous invoke() to Promise-based streaming gRPC. Update docs and tests. go mod tidy. Run make.
Rework internal/builtin/fetch/ for browser Fetch API compliance. fetch() returns Promise<Response>. Response/Headers/Request objects. Proper error types. Delete fetchStream() hack. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T014: Implement ReadableStream for Response.body streaming
sequentialTasks.description: ReadableStream with getReader() returning ReadableStreamDefaultReader. read() returns Promise<{value, done}>. Support SSE, chunked, large downloads. Back-pressure. Tests with httptest. Run make.
AbortController/AbortSignal as JS globals. Wire into fetch and goja-grpc. timeout(ms), any([signals]). Register in runtime. Tests. Run make.
Rewrite docs/archive/notes/macos-use-sdk-evaluation.md. Remove wrong incompatibility claim and Tier 1 recommendation. Reflect actual plan: eventloop migration + goja-grpc replacement. Docs only.

sequentialTasks.task: T017: Audit go-git v6 migration for sync
sequentialTasks.description: Verify non-pull sync operations use gitops. Document pull --rebase exception. Verify conflict detection. Edge cases: empty repo, detached HEAD. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T031: Rewrite architecture doc as claude-mux
sequentialTasks.description: REWRITE docs/architecture-ai-orchestrator.md FROM SCRATCH as docs/architecture-claude-mux.md. Two-channel architecture (PTY lifecycle + MCP data). Cover: invocation path, model selection TUI, dynamic MCP config, feedback protocol, guard rails, PTY spawning, multi-instance, security, BT integration, integration testing. Mermaid diagrams. DELETE old file. NEVER use 'orchestrator'.

sequentialTasks.task: T032: Rename orchestrator package to claudemux
sequentialTasks.description: Rename internal/builtin/orchestrator/ to internal/builtin/claudemux/. Update package declarations, register.go, imports, docs, JS require() calls. Breaking JS API change. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T033: Add model selection TUI parser
sequentialTasks.description: Extend parser.go in claudemux with model selection TUI parsing. Detect menu, parse models, identify selection, generate navigation keystrokes. Tests with captured samples. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T034: Rewrite BT templates as claude-mux.js
sequentialTasks.description: Rewrite scripts/bt-templates/orchestrator.js as claude-mux.js. Templates: spawn-claude, navigate-model-selection, send-task, wait-for-result, monitor-health. DELETE old file. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T035: Rewrite PR split goal and script
sequentialTasks.description: Rewrite goals/orchestrate-pr-split.json and scripts/orchestrate-pr-split.js for claude-mux. Analyze diff, propose splits, handle conflicts via Claude instances, verify independently, equivalence check. Update tests. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T061: Dynamic MCP server config per Claude instance
sequentialTasks.description: Per-instance MCP lifecycle, URL injection, startup sequencing (MCP before Claude), shutdown cleanup, config validation. Tests with mocks. Run make.
Tools: reportProgress, reportResult, requestGuidance, reportError. JSON schemas. Idempotent. Ordering guarantees. Heartbeat. Error responses. Docs in architecture and reference. Tests. Run make.

Monitor PTY (rate limits, permission prompts, crashes, timeout) and MCP (no calls, excessive frequency, repeated calls, unexpected tools, schema violations). Remediation actions. Composable thresholds. Config keys. Tests. Run make.
Multi-instance TUI. Meta-key switching (avoid tmux conflict), state save/restore, status bar, input routing, output rendering. BubbleTea integration. Tests. Run make.
PTY and MCP detection. Recovery: force-kill, restart, escalate. Cancellation: Ctrl-C, graceful shutdown, MCP cleanup. Tests. Run make.
Unique session IDs, own MCP endpoints, isolated state dirs, independent PTY handles, resource cleanup. No shared mutable state. Session registry. Tests. Run make.
JS API: osm:pty docs, MCP helpers, BT templates, parsing patterns, provider interface, guard rails middleware. Examples and docs. Run make.
Core multiplexer: instance pool, task queue, health tracking, load balancing, recycling, draining. Go code with JS API. Tests with mocks. Run make.

sequentialTasks.task: T069: Claude Code wrapper/parser native module
sequentialTasks.description: JS module bridging PTY and MCP. API: createSession, sendTask, onProgress, onResult, onGuidanceRequest, parseOutput, close. Register in register.go. Tests. Run make.
Intent classification, scope assessment, risk scoring, policy enforcement. Composable validator. Optional Ollama AI. Tests. Run make.
Multi-candidate analysis, criteria weighting, recommendations, user confirmation. Integrate with requestGuidance. Optional Ollama. Tests. Run make.
Top-level command tying everything together. Config keys. Fail-closed. Audit logging. Register as built-in command. Tests. Run make.
Purpose-built package. TestMain with -test-integration, -provider=ollama, -model=gpt-oss:20b-cloud. Full PTY flow. Behind flag. Config.mk target. Run make confirms skipped.

sequentialTasks.task: T102: Security audit of scripting sandbox
sequentialTasks.description: Audit: runtime init, require() traversal, osm:exec injection, osm:fetch SSRF, filesystem access, env vars, osm:pty, MCP. Review security tests. Fix vulnerabilities. Regression tests. Run make.
Run benchmarks. Analyze startup, script execution, ToTxtar, memory, MCP throughput. Optimize bottlenecks. Add benchmarks. benchstat comparison. Run make.
Run make-all-in-container. Fix Linux failures. Zero failures.
Run make-all-run-windows. Fix Windows failures. All non-PTY tests pass.

sequentialTasks.task: T106: Coverage report and gap analysis
sequentialTasks.description: Generate coverage. Files below 80%: write tests or document. Target critical packages above 85%. Run make.
Full stdio transport flow. JSON-RPC for each tool. Verify responses, errors, concurrency, malformed input. Run make.
10+ goroutines, crash recovery, rapid cycling, timeout, cross-process. Run with -race. Run make.
Active session, corrupted files, boundary conditions, concurrent cleanup, permissions, 1000+ sessions. Run with -race. Run make.
Empty config, unknown keys, wrong types, out-of-range, special chars, long values, duplicates, comments, encoding. Run make.
Add fuzz tests for config parsing, goal JSON, session ID sanitization, txtar generation, module paths. Run -fuzztime=30s. Run make.
All docs: accuracy, consistency, 'orchestrator' refs updated, module names match, config keys match, examples work, links valid, diagrams match implementation.
All packages: consistent formatting, user clarity, debugging context, no raw Go errors, consistent exit codes, sentinel errors. Tests for error paths. Run make.
All commands: top-level, subcommand, flag, dynamic completions. Add missing. Run make.
Description, installation, quick start, features, examples, architecture link, config reference, contributing. All examples work.
Run deadcode linter. Wire up or delete unused code. NEVER add to .deadcodeignore. Run make.
Run betteralign. Fix alignment. Verify no behavioral changes. Run make.
Verify autodiscovery=false fix is comprehensive across all tests. Cross-platform. Helper assertion. Run make.
Verify conflict handling, schema versioning, gitignored files. Edge cases. Test coverage. Run make.
Verify paths subcommands, config key respect, symlinks, permissions, performance, debug logging. Edge case tests. Run make.
Keep a Changelog 1.1.0.  Document all features, breaking changes, fixes. Update [Unreleased].
All checks on all platforms. Race detection. Coverage. Linters. Integration tests skipped. Build artifacts.
Document require() algorithm. Verify path traversal protection. Assess ESM feasibility. Document limitations.
Verify discovery, goal references, VS Code conventions, composition, templating. Docs and tests. Run make.
Add 3-5 additional built-in goals. stateVars, hotSnippets, flagDefs. Tests. Run make.

continuousVerification.task: Run 'make make-all-with-log' after EVERY significant change
continuousVerification.description: Execute after: (a) Each code change, (b) Each test addition, (c) Each task completion, (d) Each bug fix. Check build.log via 'make find-test-failures'.
continuousVerification.failPolicy: If ANY test fails, STOP IMMEDIATELY and fix before proceeding. Zero tolerance.
continuousVerification.testCoverage: Target 100% effective test coverage. VERIFY with go tool cover.
